channel.title: Programming on Just another blog!
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Just another blog!

item.title: Programming languages for teaching
item.description: While reading Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs book (sicp for short), I'm amazed by how well the topics are described. Why other topics are not explained in such a manner? At first look the book looks like it's about programming, it's actually more than that. Even though I still at chapter 3, I'm already in love with the book. Among other things it truly changes the way of thinking in general.
